subcodes.first_line: O thou who art named a servant for His great beauty! O servant of that Beloved of the world, in servitude at the sacred Threshold [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من سمی عبدا لجماله العظیم ای بنده آن محبوب عالم در عبودیت آستان مقدس
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
